# Sauté - Restaurant Management System

> Modern, AI-ready restaurant management platform.

Sauté is a premium, real-time restaurant management system designed to streamline operations for modern dining establishments.

## Core Capabilities

- **Real-Time Kitchen Display System (KDS)**: Tracks active orders with intelligent wait-time estimation based on parallel kitchen capacity slots.
- **Table Management**: Secure, PIN-protected session management with QR code ordering.
- **Dynamic Menu**: Real-time inventory tracking, availability toggles, and rich categorization.
- **Staff Operations**: Integrated shift management, role-based access control (Admin/Staff), and automated scheduling.
- **Surplus Food Recovery**: Built-in module to list and sell end-of-day surplus items to reduce food waste.

## Technical Architecture
- Built on Next.js 14 (App Router)
- Supabase (PostgreSQL) for real-time database subscriptions and row-level security.
- Tailwind CSS for modern, dark-mode ready UI components.

## Support and Contact
For deployment inquiries, enterprise licensing, or API access, please contact the Sauté development team.
